message:
feat(mission): multi-objective mission profiles and utility policy tuner (ft-1i2ge.2.9)

Add MissionProfileKind (Balanced/SafetyFirst/Throughput/UrgencyDriven/Conservative)
with MissionProfile bundling scorer + governor + extraction configs.
UtilityPolicyTuner provides runtime profile switching with override support,
bounded switch history, and effective-config getters with dimension clamping.
26 new tests (147 total in planner_features).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
